definitions: A utility for Microsoft Windows that allows for customization of the appearance of the taskbar, including making it translucent or transparent.
A free, open-source application designed to enhance the aesthetic of the Windows taskbar by applying various visual effects.
examples: I used TranslucentTB to make my taskbar transparent.
Many users appreciate the customization options offered by TranslucentTB.
TranslucentTB is available on the Microsoft Store.
